FVTT_TOOLS.HubHint: Open the tools hub to access all available features.

CRAFTING.FeatureDescription: Create recipes, manage ingredients, and craft items.
CRAFTING.RecipeManagerHint: Open the recipe manager to create, edit, and assign recipes.
CRAFTING.RaritySettingsHint: Configure points and minimum component level for each rarity tier.
CRAFTING.AutoGenerateHint: Auto-generate components based on result rarity
CRAFTING.DropComponentHint: Drag items here to add components
CRAFTING.DropResultHint: Drag an item here to set the result
CRAFTING.EmptyRecipeBook: Your recipe book is empty. Ask the GM to assign you some recipes!
CRAFTING.EmptyRecipeManager: No recipes yet. Click 'New Recipe' to create one.

Warn.MissingComponents: You don't have all the required components.
Warn.NoComponents: Please add at least one component.
Warn.NoComponentsFound: No components found in compendium for this rarity.

Error.CreateFailed: Failed to create the crafted item.

Confirm.Delete: Are you sure you want to delete the recipe "{name}"?

ENCOUNTERS.FeatureDescription: Generate random encounters from a compendium and spawn them on the map.
ENCOUNTERS.SettingsHint: Configure the compendium, creature type field, target folder, and CR groups.
ENCOUNTERS.CompendiumHint: The compendium ID to use for monsters (e.g. canadavtt.Monsters)
ENCOUNTERS.CreatureTypePathHint: Dot-notation path to the creature type field on the actor (e.g. system.details.creatureType)
ENCOUNTERS.TargetFolderHint: Name of the world folder where imported actors will be placed

Warn.NoMonsters: No monsters found with the current filters.
Warn.NoCompendium: No compendium configured. Please configure the encounter settings first.

Info.ClickMap: Click on the map to place the encounter...
